title: Modern Armor Bar
description: Modern Armor Bar adds a sleek HUD overlay that displays your equipped gear and durability directly on your screen. It provides an intuitive, lightweight utility for Minecraft to track your protection without opening your inventory.
body:
# **Modern Armor Bar**

Modern Armor Bar is a sleek, client-side utility mod for Fabric that enhances your HUD by displaying your currently equipped armor items directly on your main screen. No more opening your inventory just to check if you still have your boots on!

## **Features**

- Real-time HUD Display: See your helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots right next to your health or hotbar.
- Minimalist Design: Built to look like a native part of the Minecraft 26.1 interface.
- Performance First: Extremely lightweight client-side logic that won't impact your FPS.
- Compatibility: Works seamlessly with other HUD-altering mods.

## **Requirements**
To use this mod, ensure you have the following installed:

- Minecraft (Your version of the mod)
- Java 25 or higher

## **Installation**

- Download the .jar file for your version of Minecraft.
- Drop the file into your Minecraft mods folder.
- Launch the game and enjoy your new modern HUD!

## **License**

This project is licensed under the MIT License — feel free to use it in modpacks!
